response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive senior-level experience in software development, leadership, and open-source contributions, aligning well with the Head of Development role. His technical breadth (multiple languages, architectures, and domains) and leadership in team mentoring and project management are strong positives. However, his German proficiency is basic, and his UML experience is not explicitly mentioned, which may be minor concerns for an executive-level role.
strengths: Extensive senior leadership experience in software development, including team mentoring and project management
Strong open-source contributions and deep technical expertise across multiple languages and architectures (e.g., Node.js, DLang, Python)
Proven track record in IT architecture, system design, and strategic thinking across diverse industries (e.g., GIS, AI-agent infrastructure)
concerns: German language proficiency is only at a basic level, falling short of the required C1 minimum
No explicit mention of UML expertise, a desired skill for modeling and design requirements
Limited evidence of formal IT security, risk management, or compliance leadership experience in the resume
